author: y4rr
content:
Landed the core ops; RoI / GIoU split out to #610.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-vision/src/ops.rs\`

### Box geometry
- \`BoxFormat\` enum: \`Xyxy\`, \`Xywh\`, \`Cxcywh\`
- \`box_convert(boxes, in_fmt, out_fmt)\` â€” round-trips between all three formats; same-format returns clone
- \`box_area(boxes)\` â€” \`[N, 4] xyxy â†’ [N]\`
- \`box_iou(boxes1, boxes2)\` â€” pairwise IoU \`[N, 4] Ă— [M, 4] â†’ [N, M]\`
- \`clip_boxes_to_image(boxes, [H, W])\` â€” clamp coords to image bounds
- \`remove_small_boxes(boxes, min_size) â†’ Vec<usize>\` â€” index list of survivors

### NMS
- \`nms(boxes, scores, iou_threshold) â†’ Vec<usize>\` â€” greedy, sorted by descending score
- \`batched_nms(boxes, scores, idxs, iou_threshold)\` â€” per-class via the torchvision shift-by-class trick (each box offset by \`class_id * (max_coord + 1)\` so different-class boxes never overlap, then a single NMS pass).

### Focal loss
- \`LossReduction\` enum: \`None\`, \`Mean\`, \`Sum\`
- \`sigmoid_focal_loss(inputs, targets, alpha, gamma, reduction)\` â€” numerically stable via \`softplus(z) - yÂ·z\` (BCE-with-logits) Ă— \`(1 - p_t)^Îł\` Ă— optional alpha-balance. \`alpha = -1.0\` matches torchvision's "no alpha" sentinel. Composable from existing differentiable primitives â†’ autograd works.
- \`focal_loss(inputs, targets, alpha, gamma, reduction)\` â€” CE-style variant operating on already-normalized probabilities; uses \`-log(p_t)\` directly with eps-shifted log to handle \`p_t = 0\`.

## Tests (20 new)
- box_convert: xyxyâ†”xywh, xyxyâ†’cxcywh closed-form, xywhâ†’xyxy roundtrip, same-format clone
- box_iou: full overlap = 1, no overlap = 0, half overlap = 1/3, NxM shape
- box_area, clip_boxes_to_image, remove_small_boxes correctness
- NMS: high-score wins overlap, non-overlapping preserved, threshold-dependent behavior, score-shape rejection
- batched_nms: per-class independence (overlapping different-class boxes both kept)
- sigmoid_focal_loss: closed-form check at zero logits / zero targets, alpha=-1 disables balancing
- focal_loss: shape-mismatch error path, zero loss for perfect prediction

## Verification
- \`cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --lib ops::\`: 20/20 pass
- \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions

## Out of scope â†’ #610
- \`roi_align\` and \`roi_pool\` â€” benefit from a GPU kernel; CPU reference + cubecl GPU port can land together
- \`generalized_box_iou\` (GIoU loss for DETR), \`distance_box_iou\` (DIoU), \`complete_box_iou\` (CIoU)
